title: Citrus
sourceNotes: The 2018 TV anime (12 eps, single season) adapts Saburouta's complete yuri manga (50 chapters across 10 volumes; AniList id 80145, FINISHED) covering roughly volumes 1-6. Mapped against the original Citrus manga, not the Citrus+ sequel (id 103884). At ~5 chapters per volume the anime ends partway through volume 6, leaving chapters 31-50 (the rest of the Aihara family / engagement resolution through the wedding) unadapted. Internal episode-to-chapter boundaries are approximate.

mappings.arc: Transfer & Step-Sisters (Yuzu meets council president Mei, learns they're new step-sisters)
Harumin & the Chairman (growing tension; Mei's grandfather and the Aihara household)
Matsuri (Yuzu's manipulative childhood friend tests the sisters' bond)
Aihara Resolution & Wedding (unadapted manga tail, vols 7-10)
